Header files for `inttypes.h` and `setjmp.h` with definitions and declarations for non-local jumps.


## Files
- **[inttypes.h](inttypes.h.md)**: Defines a header guard for the `inttypes.h` file without additional content.
- **[setjmp.h](setjmp.h.md)**: Defines `jmp_buf` and declares `setjmp` and `longjmp` functions for non-local jumps.
